programme.title: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: With the help of allies, Lt. Jim Gordon and DA Harvey Dent, Batman is able to keep a tight lid on crime in Gotham City. But when a young criminal calling himself the Joker suddenly throws the town into chaos, the caped crusader begins to tread a fine line between heroism and vigilantism.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: You Hurt My Feelings
programme.desc: A novelist's long-standing marriage is suddenly upended when she overhears her husband give his honest reaction to her latest book.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Out Standing
programme.desc: Officer Sandra Perron resigns from the Canadian military after a controversial photo surfaces. Adapting to civilian life amidst an investigation, she denies abuse allegations despite evidence suggesting mistreatment within her unit.

programme.title: Sisu: Road to Revenge
programme.desc: Korpi dismantles the house where his family was murdered and loads it on a truck to rebuild it somewhere safe. He soon finds himself in a violent cross-country chase as the Red Army commander who killed his family comes back to finish the job.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Shoresy
programme.desc: The Bulldogs get back on the same page; Shoresy doubles down on the Lakers.

programme.title: Die Alone
programme.desc: A young man with amnesia bands together with a rugged survivalist after a devastating virus causes a zombie-like outbreak.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lovely
programme.desc: An up-and-coming boxer from the projects begins questioning his dream after unforeseen circumstances alter his life.

programme.title: A '90s Christmas
programme.desc: A workaholic lawyer destined to spend Christmas alone is transported back to 1999 after an unexpected run in with a particularly wise ride-share driver.

programme.title: Rock N' Roll Christmas
programme.desc: An estranged mother/daughter country music duo reunite after 10 years apart to release a Christmas single after a video of them goes viral.

programme.title: Gem & Shaz
programme.desc: Two Asian Canadian teenage girls are given one hour at the school dance by their strict immigrant parents and are determined to make the most of it.

programme.title: All I Want for Christmas
programme.desc: A young girl's Christmas wish for her divorced parents to get back together becomes a reality with a twist of holiday joy, comedy, and laughter.

programme.title: Jurassic World Dominion
programme.desc: Four years after the destruction of Isla Nublar, dinosaurs now live and hunt alongside humans all over the world. This fragile balance will reshape the future and determine, once and for all, whether human beings are to remain the apex predators on a planet they now share with history's most fearsome creatures.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Recipe for Romance
programme.desc: Sari's big plans get derailed when Gabe opens a bakery next door to her family's coffee shop. This launches a prank war to end all prank wars, bringing Sari and Gabe together in a story of love, family, community and delicious pastries.

programme.title: Stop Making Sense
programme.desc: Filmmaker Jonathan Demme captures Talking Heads and an ecstatic ensemble of musicians at their exhilarating best in this iconic live performance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Devotion
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Jesse Brown, the first Black aviator in U.S. Navy history, and his enduring friendship with fellow fighter pilot Tom Hudner. Helping to turn the tide in the most brutal battle in the Korean War, their heroic sacrifices ultimately make them the Navy's most celebrated wingmen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: The York Memorial team deals with the life changing-surgery of one of their own.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Karen remembers what it feels like to be a school kid again when she takes up a new form of exercise.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: An initially fun game of golf between Brent, Lacey and Hank quickly turns into a round robin of aggravation.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a young violinist whose fellow musicians resented her rapid rise to fame.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Border Hunters
programme.desc: In Puerto Vallarta, Mexico, a fentanyl overdose claims the lives of an American youth and a paramedic, drawing the U.S. ambassador into a desperate mission to dismantle the cartels. When former spy Abraham Woodhill enlists imprisoned ex-operative Jake Byrne, a violent, high-stakes game unfolds across jungles, villages and cartel strongholds.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Blue Moon
programme.desc: In 1943 lyricist Lorenz Hart confronts his shattered self-confidence in a bar as his former collaborator, Richard Rodgers, celebrates the opening night of his groundbreaking hit musical "Oklahoma!".

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Sorry, Baby
programme.desc: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: It Comes in Waves
programme.desc: After fleeing Rwanda's horrors, a family of four starts anew in Ottawa, Canada, where they face unexpected challenges and harsh realities in their pursuit of a better life.

programme.title: Longing
programme.desc: Daniel, a wealthy bachelor in his 60s, learns that a former girlfriend gave birth to a child 20 years ago and that his son has just died. Daniel explores his deceased son's life, getting to know him vicariously through those closest to him, and he reevaluates his life choices.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Hot Flash
programme.desc: A TV newscaster tries to keep her cool when one type of flash leads to another.

programme.title: Solemates
programme.desc: A love triangle between a shoe store owner, a customer and an old pair of shoes. When Andrew walks into William's store to replace his own worn old pair of brogues, interest is piqued.

programme.title: Rush for Your Life
programme.desc: Journalism student Tasha goes under cover as a sorority pledge to expose the people responsible for the death of a student the prior year. She quickly finds herself completing dangerous hazing rituals to secure a spot in the sorority.

programme.title: Night of the Zoopocalypse
programme.desc: When a meteor unleashes a virus that turns zoo animals into zombies, a mountain lion and a wolf lead a team of survivors to save the day.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Recipe for Romance
programme.desc: Sari's big plans get derailed when Gabe opens a bakery next door to her family's coffee shop. This launches a prank war to end all prank wars, bringing Sari and Gabe together in a story of love, family, community and delicious pastries.

programme.title: Diamonds Are Forever
programme.desc: While investigating mysterious activities in the world diamond market, 007 (Sean Connery) discovers that his evil nemesis Blofeld (Charles Gray) is stockpiling the gems to use in his deadly laser satellite. With the help of beautiful smuggler Tiffany Case (Jill St. John), Bond sets out to stop the madman -- as the fate of the world hangs in the balance!

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: White Bird: A Wonder Story
programme.desc: Julian has struggled to belong ever since he was expelled from his former school for his treatment of Auggie Pullman. To transform his life, Julian's grandmother finally reveals her own story of courage. During her youth in Nazi-occupied France, a boy shelters her from mortal danger. Together, they find first love in a stunning, magical world of their own creation, while the boy's mother risks everything to keep her safe.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Live and Let Die
programme.desc: When Bond (Roger Moore) investigates the murders of three fellow agents, he finds himself a target, evading vicious assassins as he closes in on powerful Kananga (Yaphet Kotto). Known on the streets as Mr. Big, Kananga is coordinating a global threat, using tons of self-produced heroin. As Bond tries to unravel the mastermind's plan, he meets Solitaire (Jane Seymour), a beautiful tarot-card reader, whose magic is crucial to the crime lord.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ready Jet Go: Space Camp: The Movie
programme.desc: Jet and his friends take their skills to Space Camp and experience an intergalactic adventure.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash passes on an opportunity, and works cases where things are not as they appear; Mags returns to York Memorial; June navigates loss professionally and personally; Theo goes out on a limb again for a patient; Claire is confronted by Devi.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Karen and Davis investigate a mysterious crop circle near Dog River; Oscar and Emma repaint their house.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Wanda's latest crush gives her his number; Brent questions his sense of smell; the Ruby gets a touch up.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The stabbing death of a gang leader in a prison scuffle has Briscoe and Green looking at both inmates and corrections officers as possible suspects.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Long Walk
programme.desc: Teens participate in a grueling high-stakes contest where they must continuously walk or be shot by a member of their military escort.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Oh, Hi!
programme.desc: Iris is enjoying her first romantic getaway with Isaac, until he tells her he's not interested in a serious relationship.
